  "claims": [
    "California's High-Speed Rail project can serve as an engine for the state's economic growth.",
    "The high-speed rail plan aims to connect California's population centers from the Bay Area to Northern Los Angeles.",
    "High-speed rail can help accelerate economic revival in many areas across California.",
    "Building a station for high-speed rail offers opportunities to spark new housing, grow local businesses, and create jobs.",
    "Stable, long-term funding is essential to keep high-speed rail projects on track.",
